TidyFlowOperations Hub
Continuous Synchronization

Unified Cloud Integration

Keep your properties, schedules, and billing synchronized across your core business tools.

Two-Way Google Sheets Sync

Many professional cleaning operations run on customized spreadsheet rosters. TidyFlow respects this workflow. By connecting your master Sheet URL, our system automatically populates your app's property listings, checklists, and active tasks.

田
Open Master Sheet Template
Required spreadsheet format

Create a Google Sheet featuring two tabs: Properties (address, property ID, rates) and Tasks (scheduled dates, assignments, statuses). Share edit permissions with our secure service account email, and watch the updates synchronize bi-directionally!

Stripe Subscriptions

Automate monthly company base plan charges and track property add-ons securely.

Google Maps Geofences

Verifies cleaner arrival timestamps automatically using strict geofenced coordinate locks.

田

Google Sheet Sync Stream

TidyFlowOperations Hub

Cleaning company software for modern janitorial teams. Connect field operations, rota sheets, GPS-verified hours, payroll exports, and client proof on one offline-first cloud platform.
